scripts.test: node --test --test-concurrency=1 tests/bot.test.mjs tests/browser-director.test.mjs tests/truth-reset.test.mjs tests/studio-foundation.test.mjs && python3 -m unittest tests/test_asset_recovery.py tests/test_recovery_analyzer.py tests/test_comfy_png_metadata.py tests/test_comic_png_metadata_v2.py -v && node scripts/check.mjs && node scripts/check_evidence_chain.mjs && node scripts/check_studio_foundation.mjs
scripts.test:recovery: python3 -m unittest tests/test_asset_recovery.py tests/test_recovery_analyzer.py tests/test_comfy_png_metadata.py tests/test_comic_png_metadata_v2.py -v
scripts.test:truth: node --test --test-concurrency=1 tests/bot.test.mjs tests/browser-director.test.mjs tests/truth-reset.test.mjs tests/studio-foundation.test.mjs && node scripts/check.mjs && node scripts/check_evidence_chain.mjs && node scripts/check_studio_foundation.mjs
scripts.build:studio: npm --prefix studio-app run build && node scripts/check_studio_foundation.mjs --require-dist
scripts.check: node scripts/check.mjs && node scripts/check_evidence_chain.mjs && node scripts/check_studio_foundation.mjs
